policy: Approval files created before APPROVAL-FILE-INTEGRITY-001 are accepted only when explicitly listed here. New approval files must use approvalSchemaVersion 2 with an approved-plan hash and approval digest.

legacyApprovals.reason: Historical approval file predates approval-integrity v2 and is explicitly grandfathered for existing shipped cards.
